name: sandcastle-max
description: AFK Claude Code agents en Docker contra tu Claude Max subscription (vía CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN, workaround para Sandcastle issue #191 wontfix). v0.5.0: Opus 4.7 default everywhere (implementer + reviewer + resolver + fixer), soporte de feature branches + worktrees (naming agent/<base-slug>/issue-N), self-check vs brief pre-PR, ciclo completo sin GH Actions. Slash commands: /sandcastle-init (scaffolding), /sandcastle-dispatch-wave (dispatch paralelo con dep graph), /sandcastle-merge-wave (review Opus + coordinator topológico + merge serial con auto-rebase y conflict-resolver intent-aware), /sandcastle-pipeline (integrador con loop, checkpoints, quota detection). Script scripts/sandcastle-validate.sh reemplaza afk-checks.yml remoto con container Docker liviano local. /afk-pr-triage queda como legacy fallback. Skill sandcastle-afk documenta gotchas + grep map de Sandcastle internals.
